title: Custom Hamilton Music 3
description: Changes the default disk music to music from Hamilton
body:
Only changed disks are listed

5- Hurricane

11- Cabinet Battle 1

13- Cabinet Battle 2

blocks- Washington On Your Side

cat- Say No To This

chirp- One Last Time

far- We Know

mall- Burn

mellohi- The Room Where It Happens

otherside- Blow Us All Away

pigstep- Best Of Wives and Best of Women

relic- The World was Wide Enough

stal- Dear Theodosia

strad- Who Lives, Who Dies, Who Tells Your Story

All songs are properties of their respective artists

Please donate to The Broadway League Foundation.

About Charity: The Broadway League Foundation Inc. acts as The Broadway League's charitable arm. Its mission is to support the arts education, community engagement, and audience access programs of the Broadway League.

https://www.broadwayleague.com/about/foundation/

!DISCLAIMER!

This does not include the new 1.21 discs, but I may include them in the future

also this is compatible with 1.21 as is all of my content
